steps.title: Count x-intercepts
steps.content: Solutions to $f(x)=0$ are the $x$-values where the graph touches or crosses the $x$-axis. The word distinct means a tangent point counts once.

steps.title: Use the graph
steps.content: The graph touches the $x$-axis at one point and crosses it at one other point. That gives $2$ distinct values of $x$ where $f(x)=0$. The answer is B.
